Package <Unnamed>

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    Reminder
    Interface used for assignment reminder features.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    Assignment
    Represents a school assignment with a due date, estimated study hours, and reminder settings.
    Main
    Main class that runs the Study Schedule Program.
    Notification
    Sends reminders for assignments that are due soon.
    StudySchedule
    Manages assignments by sorting them and calculating daily study workload.
    Task
    Abstract parent class that represents a general task.
    UserInput
    Handles user input and validates data entered through the Scanner.
